name: Add or Remove Computer from DC
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Add or Remove Computer from DC
SIGMA Description: Detects the creation or removal of a computer. Can be used to detect attacks such as DCShadow via the creation of a new SPN.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('4741', '4743') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Add or Remove Computer from DC on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('4741', '4743') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Add or Remove Computer from DC
